anytime:
Try one new thing 
every day

Rap Music 
is Good for You

You will never regret 
being kind
Every day is all there is

Follow your plan, 
not your mood

Don't put it down, 
put it away

Dream big. 
Start small. 
Act now.

Look your best, 
feel your best

Remember when you 
wanted everything 
you have today
Don't think about it, do it
evening:
Take a moment 

        to be grateful 
for today

Don't put it down, 
put it away

Plan your work 
work your plan
